readme.description: Open-source front door with quickstart, features, and installation

docs.description: Comprehensive workflow documentation covering all commands

commandCoverage.description: Every skill in skills/ directory has corresponding documentation in DOCS.md or docs/

noStaleReferences.description: No documentation references commands or features that do not exist in the current codebase

definition.scope: Create comprehensive documentation for open-sourcing including an updated README.md, rewritten DOCS.md covering the full canonical workflow, and updated docs/ reference files for all commands.

tasks.description: Rewrite README.md as open-source front door
tasks.acceptance: Includes quickstart, feature overview, installation, and architecture diagram

tasks.description: Rewrite DOCS.md with canonical workflow documentation

tasks.acceptance: Each command has a docs section

tasks.description: Update all existing docs/ files to reflect current state
tasks.acceptance: No stale references to removed features

tasks.description: Cross-reference verification: every skill has documentation
